Get started with rsgl

Source: vignettes/rsgl.Rmd
rsgl.Rmd
library(rsgl)

What is SGL?

Placeholder. A short pitch for SGL — a grammar of graphics language designed to look and feel like SQL — and how rsgl translates SGL statements against any DBI connection into a ggplot2 plot.

Installation

Placeholder. Install instructions (CRAN once published, dev version from GitHub).

Your first plot

Placeholder. End-to-end example: open a DBI connection, write data, call dbGetPlot() with an SGL statement.
